evals.prompt: Set up a blue-green deployment for my Node.js API on AWS, with automatic rollback if health checks fail.
evals.expected_output: Complete blue-green setup: infrastructure config, health check strategy, traffic switching, rollback trigger

evals.prompt: 帮我配置一个 Kubernetes 滚动更新策略，确保新版本有问题时能自动回滚，同时保持 99.9% 可用性。
evals.expected_output: K8s deployment yaml：maxSurge/maxUnavailable 配置 + readinessProbe + rollback 触发条件

evals.prompt: I want to implement canary deployment for my microservice that handles payments. Walk me through the process.
evals.expected_output: Canary strategy: traffic split config, monitoring setup, promotion/rollback criteria
